title: RawToolResponse
description: Illustrative only: the opaque payload the legacy data source returns before the PostToolUse hook runs. Never reaches the model directly (FR-004). Retained verbatim in AuditRecord (FR-005, SC-004). Shape documented for audit-log roundtrip purposes only; the legacy source may emit arbitrary XML, so content_type / raw_bytes are intentionally loose.

tool_use_id.description: Anthropic SDK tool_use_id — correlates this response with the originating tool_use block and with its AuditRecord.

tool_name.description: Name of the legacy tool that produced this payload.

raw_bytes_b64.description: Base64 of the exact bytes returned by the source. Losslessly recoverable for SC-004.

content_type.description: Declared MIME type. Non-XML bodies are permitted but will surface downstream as parse_degraded.

received_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp when the hook observed the payload.
